assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response clearly states that Regular channel clusters will have 'Automatic force-upgrade to 1.31 when 1.30 reaches EoS' with control plane upgrading first, then node pools

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support for 1.30 (vs standard 14 months)' and mentions they have 'breathing room'

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: Response clearly states for No channel clusters: 'Control plane: Auto-upgraded to 1.31 at EoS' and 'Node pools: Force-upgraded even if "no auto-upgrade" is configured'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Response includes specific command for 'no upgrades' exclusion and states 'This works even AFTER EoS for temporary deferral' with '30-day "no upgrades" exclusion' mentioned

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response has 'Option 1: Proactive Manual Upgrades (Recommended)' and states 'Get ahead of the EoS deadline by upgrading on your schedule' with detailed upgrade commands

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Cloud Logging or EoS notifications as planning tools, though it mentions other monitoring/assessment tools

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Audit deprecated API usage: check GKE deprecation insights dashboard' in the immediate action plan

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Response does not use the term 'snowflaking' or explicitly warn against manually freezing versions, though it does recommend proactive upgrades and mentions security patches
